description: This image is a SPOT-5 satellite photograph (2.5 m spatial resolution) of non-irrigated agricultural fields in Northern Germany, acquired on 2012-07-27. The imagery uses a 1/2/3 Band Combination. It depicts a landscape structured by rectangular fields, showing a heterogeneous pattern of different colours and textures indicative of diverse crops. Red colours signify vital green vegetation, while green and light blue colours suggest open soil from fields that have already been harvested. Thin linear features, likely field boundaries or access paths, separate the agricultural parcels. The source is CNES 2012©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
